title: erigeron contortus
intro: Erigeron contortus, also known as the 'Alpine Fleabane', is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Erigeron contortus are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Erigeron contortus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
